channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Infantry Dolabra
item.description: Adds a versatile multitool with switchable tool modes for mining, digging, and woodcutting

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Auto Walk Extended
item.description: Toggle automatic walking, sprinting and sneaking. Supports also automatic climbing.

item.title: Ghaelen's Tweaks
item.description: My personal tweaks I like to play with.

item.title: Meliora Meadows Adjustments
item.description: Adjusts A LOT of mods, applying Aldi's Classes trait restrictions and disabling some jsons.

item.title: Player Model lib
item.description: Library for adding new player races

item.title: Salty´s Movement: Slow Walk
item.description: Immersive walking speed in cycles.

item.title: fish(wastaken) Classes Patch
item.description: small personal patch for GlooMeClasses.

item.title: Extra Shelves
item.description: Adds a few variant of shelves like the game's shelves.

item.title: Optimum
item.description: High-performance client fork. Compile-time patches, no Harmony. Same gameplay, faster frames

item.title: xSkills Fork
item.description: RPG-style skill system with abilities, perks, and progression.

item.title: Exotic Milk
item.description: Have you ever wanted milk from an entity that doesnt normally produce milk? Now's your chance!

item.title: octatonic
item.description: Mod manager via command line interface

item.title: Boat Autopilot
item.description: Long boat trips in Vintage Story are beautiful… the first three times.

item.title: Timber!
item.description: A mostly visual mod where trees fall over then drop their items.

item.title: Advanced Chat
item.description: A fully customizable, movable, resizable chat overlay for Vintage Story. Take control of your chat w

item.title: Swixy Claim Chunk
item.description: Claiming made easy. Press [P], click a chunk, and it's yours!

item.title: Kaschperle Class Mix
item.description: A revision mix from the popular class mod Aldi classes and Agi's Classes

item.title: OptiTime
item.description: Clientside performance optimizations, specially for modded gameplays

item.title: RTP - Random Teleport: Reborn
item.description: Teleport to new place with your friends!

item.title: Aging Barrels Fork
item.description: Adds aging barrels to speed up Expanded Foods curing. Fixes CTD.

item.title: Tabletop Games
item.description: Play real-world tabletop games or create your own

item.title: Immersive Woodworking
item.description: Focused immersion mod that makes processing timber feel like work, not paperwork.

item.title: Wurm Online Soundtrack
item.description: Adds the Wurm Online soundtrack to the game.

item.title: Billposting
item.description: Makes it possible to pin parchments to wall and display their contents in-world. Now with formatting

item.title: More animations
item.description: Better body and face animations

item.title: Equus: Medieval Horses
item.description: Adds a medieval warhorse to the game that can be purchased from a new horse trader

item.title: Jaunt: Entity Movement System
item.description: Library providing an extended entity riding system with additional control patterns and stamina

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Introduces new weather mechanics using the vanilla weather system.

item.title: The Gravestones Mod - 1.22.3
item.description: Adds a gravestone which stores the players inventory upon death and can be retrieved by them later.
